## Promotion

> When this concept is validated and ready for full exploration, promote it to a design document:
> 1. Create a design doc in `.github/ideation/designs/` using the design-doc-template
> 2. Reference this concept in the design doc's Overview section
> 3. Update the `promoted_to` field in this concept's frontmatter with the design doc path
> 4. Update `status` to `promoted`
